title: Research Agent Claim
description: A single verified claim in the research ledger. Every entry in the claims/ directory must conform to this schema.

claim_id.description: Stable identifier of the form vms-YYYY-NNNN. NNNN is zero-padded sequential within the year.

submitted_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of original submission. Never changed after submission.

submitted_by.description: GitHub username or stable identifier of the contributor.

claim_text.description: What is being asserted. One to three sentences.

source_id.description: Identifier of the source in the corpus.

passage_reference.description: Specific passage being cited. May be a paragraph index, page reference, or direct quote.

quoted_text.description: If a direct quotation, the verbatim text. Subject to verify_quotation check at submission.

verification_similarity.description: Score from the verifier. 100 = exact match. Required if verification_status is fuzzy or failed.

falsifier.description: Specific condition that would falsify or substantially weaken the claim. Boilerplate falsifiers are rejected by the application.

depends_on.description: List of claim_ids this claim builds on. Retraction of any depended-on claim flags this one for re-verification.

retraction_reason.description: Required if retracted is true. Explains why the claim was withdrawn.

discussion_notes.description: Author's notes on the claim's place in the broader argument, context for readers, or open questions.
